programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is a huge success when he fills in for Krusty on TV. Guest starring Mr T and Jackie Mason.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: It turns out that Brandine Spuckler is a secret genius - something that Cletus just can't accept.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Gyles Brandreth, Joanna Lumley, Judi Love and Micah Richards are just some of the celebs watching Stranger Things, This Is MY House, Million Pound Pawn, and lots of other great TV.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Starstruck, The Piano, You, Rick Stein's Cornwall, Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over USA, This Morning (longest tongue record) and ITV News of a cheese controversy.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Coronation Street, Love Island, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Starstruck, Cheat, Dancing on Ice, and Catfish UK.

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: Jess from Made in Chelsea, weather presenter Sian Lloyd, Daniel Brocklebank (vicar Billy from Corrie) and Musharaf from Educating Yorkshire go on dates with members of the public.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: On the menu in this episode are five pairs of hopefuls, including an Irishman with Tourette's who's looking for the man of his dreams, and two singletons with strange dance moves.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Starstruck, The Piano, You, Rick Stein's Cornwall, Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over USA, This Morning (longest tongue record) and ITV News of a cheese controversy.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Coronation Street, Love Island, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Starstruck, Cheat, Dancing on Ice, and Catfish UK.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Essex groom Gary plans an aquatic wedding 200 miles from home. But Lauren hopes for a home counties service. Will Gary's underwater dream sink without a trace.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Sofia dreams of a boho beach blessing, but Craig wants an Oktoberfest wedding with short leather trousers. Will Sofia end the nuptials.

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: As Frankie prepares to leave the village, the Keanes get ready to surprise their estranged family by moving to Hollyoaks. But in a devastating twist of fate, things spiral out of control..

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam and Mitch debate the pros and cons of adopting another baby after receiving an unexpected call from the agency. And Claire lands an interview for her dream job.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: When Mitchell struggles to let go of his old life, Gloria helps him say goodbye. And Haley, Luke and Alex decide to throw a party at the Dunphy house.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell and Cam settle on their new normal, and Phil and Claire decide that one of the kids needs to move out so they can take control of the house again.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: In the last ever episode, the entire family discover that saying goodbye is much harder than it seems.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In Michigan, Gordon Ramsay visits a lakeside restaurant in a summer hotspot, where the food fails to match the fantastic views. Can Gordon turn the tide.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's rescue mission this time is Hannah & Mason's, a French bistro in the quaint little town of Cranbury, New Jersey.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The Couples' Retreat continues amid a sour atmosphere, with Bec's comments from the first night fuelling a venomous divide in the group.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After a divisive week away, it's dinner party time again - and the mood is extremely combustible. Then again, it wouldn't be MAFS if it wasn't..

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Madcap adventure-comedy video game adaptation with Jim Carrey and Ben Schwartz. Can nippy ring-chasing hedgehog Sonic escape the clutches of an evil, moustachioed scientist.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer insults the bin men, they stop collecting his rubbish, so he challenges the sanitation commissioner to an election. Guest starring U2.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: As part of an advertising campaign for a new apple-flavoured breakfast bar, Homer agrees to climb the Murderhorn, Springfield's tallest mountain.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa's museum visit plans are ruined when Bart glues novelty items to his face. So she decides to go alone on the bus, but ends up on the wrong side of town..

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge spice up their love life by snuggling in public places, including a barn and the crazy golf course. But then they lose their clothes..

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart's class is temporarily merged with another at school, he has to share a desk with a girl called Nikki and soon develops a crush on her.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: Have our teams bitten off more bull's penis soup than they can chew in Penang? Plus: shoe-making, and a gruelling uphill race to the finish.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa meets Bleeding Gums Murphy's deaf son Monk, and decides she has to help him - whether he wants help or not.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes infatuated with his new teacher. Lisa becomes infatuated with an octopus.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Taron Egerton is Elton John in Dexter Fletcher's sequins-and-all biopic musical drama. With Jamie Bell as lyricist Bernie Taupin and Stephen Graham as music mogul Dick James.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics watch Wild Isles, Rise and Fall, Challenge Anneka, Race Across the World and The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up To Cancer.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Great Expectations and Rise and Fall are on the box this time. And Wild Isles, Tempting Fortune, Married at First Sight Australia and Dance 100.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Nicola's been divorced twice but is still young at heart and hopes for a new love. Mark, who has Crohn's disease, has lost his body confidence but is now ready to conquer his fear.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Best mates Josh and Jack descend on the restaurant for a double date. Tomboy boat-builder Abbey returns to the restaurant hoping to be lucky in love second time around.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics watch Wild Isles, Rise and Fall, Challenge Anneka, Race Across the World and The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up To Cancer.

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: As Frankie prepares to leave the village, the Keanes get ready to surprise their estranged family by moving to Hollyoaks. But in a devastating twist of fate, things spiral out of control..

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: It's a race against time when an overturned van is spotted on the side of the road. Meanwhile, a resident's buried secret is revealed..

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The aftermath of the devastating crash continues. And while things look up for Dodger and Theresa, Kathleen-Angel causes tension..

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits the historic Olde Hitching Post restaurant in Massachusetts. Tom bought the business for his daughter but refuses to let her run it.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: With Geoff away on spring break, Lainey heads to Hollywood to see her best friend. Adam is invited to join the cool kids' poker night.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica returns from spring break determined to find out where she stands with Geoff. Adam's plan to get Dave Kim a date for prom backfires.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire swap parenting roles for the day - Claire will be the fun-loving good cop and Phil the disciplinarian bad cop.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family gather at Jay's before heading to Alex's middle school graduation ceremony. While they're there, Jay tries to hide a Botox mishap from everyone.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After a divisive week away, it's dinner party time again - and the mood is extremely combustible. Then again, it wouldn't be MAFS if it wasn't..

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: After a life-threatening illness, Georgina's back on the dating scene and looking for a rugged man. Kate seeks a Viking while Ashley wants a man who can make a deeper connection.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Pennsylvania, where he meets siblings whose inability to work together is risking their father's life savings at his Italian restaurant, Levanti's.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge posts a photo on social media that gets Homer fired, so he returns to his old job as a dish-washer in a Greek restaurant. Lisa creates an app.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is smitten with his new teacher and tries to impress her. Homer buys a new type of milk that has a strange effect on Bart and Lisa.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: When an old neighbourhood kid returns to town as a hugely successful internet billionaire, it gets Phil thinking of what could have been.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Pritchett clan decide to celebrate Christmas a little early so they split up to gather the holiday trappings as Mitchell, Alex and Lily hunt for a tree.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After a divisive week away, it's dinner party time again - and the mood is extremely combustible. Then again, it wouldn't be MAFS if it wasn't..

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models are joined by four NFL stars for a game of flag football, before being paired off for a bar fight-themed photo shoot. What could possibly go wrong.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes a deal with a travel agent to transport a briefcase with secret contents to Paris in exchange for a cheap family holiday.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer turns to improvisational comedy to bolster his public speaking. Marge decides to upgrade Bart's tumbledown treehouse, but he questions her building skills.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A shocking discovery for Ste forces a confrontation. Jack finds himself in the middle of his feuding relatives. And a teenager refuses to take orders from their mum.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia - Brand new series
programme.desc: The fifth Commitment Ceremony erupts when Juliette exposes some incendiary messages written by Bec, leading to a deliciously dramatic departure.
